seo.title: Mayonnaise - as easy as whisking eggs - Marinda Kook

html:
Making your own mayonnaise is so freeing. It's something that's quick and easy to make.. Make sure the ingredients aren't too cold. Take the eggs out of the fridge beforehand.

INGREDIENTS:

  • 3 egg yolks
  • 10 ml dijon mustard
  • 5 ml sugar
  • 10 ml white wine vinegar or lemon juice
  • 300 ml canola oil
  • 3 ml salt
  • pinch of pepper

NOW:

  1. whisk everything except the oil together for about 20 seconds in the food processor
  2. now add the oil in a thin stream, really very slowly – it needs to happen very slowly – the mixture thickens.
  3. spoon into bottles and store in the fridge.

You can flavour the mayonnaise with:

garlic, anchovies, pesto or fresh herbs.

Store-bought mayonnaise will never taste as good again as your own mayonnaise.
